note: Working Privacy Pools deployment. The WithdrawalVerifier was regenerated from the proving key (the upstream repo's committed verifier did not match its committed proving key, which caused on-chain InvalidProof). Full deposit -> shielded -> withdraw round-trip verified on-chain.
